name: Chocolate Prune Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Prunes, pitted and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a bundt pan by greasing it with butter.
3. Sprinkle baking soda over the prunes and pour boiling water over them. Allow to cool completely.
4. In a food processor, cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, processing after each addition.
6. Mix in the prune mixture.
7. Sift flour and cocoa powder into a bowl; mix until combined using an on/off motion.
8. Pour batter into the prepared bundt pan.
9. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Turn cake onto a wire rack to cool completely before serving. Optionally, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
This is a deliciously moist cake that no one will suspect contains prunes unless you tell them!
